comment: Hand-computed expected structure for toy_dict.json (PREREG §4). Peel: t1 (out-deg 0) then t2 (out-deg 0 after t1); u1/u2/u3 isolated. Kernel = out-deg>=1 fixpoint. Core = largest SCC {c1,c2,c3,c4}; satellite 2-cycle {s1,s2}; connective singleton {g}. Two vertex-disjoint cycles => minimal FVS = one of {c1,c2,c3,c4} + one of {s1,s2}, size 2, 8 distinct.
